request.message: I need a custom birthday cake tomorrow afternoon with a soccer theme

expected.answer: For custom birthday/design requests, HappyCake needs headcount, flavor, theme/reference photo, exact pickup time, name-on-cake, and allergy notes. Custom work is owner-gated before we promise kitchen capacity; if timing is tight in Sugar Land, I can suggest ready-made cake "Honey" (medovik) or cake "Milk Maiden" instead.
